name: Bankr Router
description: Local BANKR-only smart router for OpenClaw with auto config discovery

port.description: HTTP port for the router server

host.description: HTTP host for the router server

openclawConfigPath.description: Explicit path to openclaw.json. If null, auto-discovery is used

bankrProviderId.description: Provider ID for Bankr in your OpenClaw config

routerProviderId.description: Provider ID for this router in your OpenClaw config
